description: Search in a broader area (e.g., Old Town, New Town, Edinburgh) to find a venue with a valid venue_id
success_criterion: A venue with a valid venue_id is returned in the search results

description: Reduce party size requirement and search again to find a venue with valid venue_id
success_criterion: Venue with valid venue_id is found with reduced party size

description: Increase budget and search again to find a venue with valid venue_id
success_criterion: Venue with valid venue_id is found with higher budget
